case_title: TOMAS PENA DBA LATIN JEWELERS VS ORTIZ, RAFAEL JR.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $295.20 FILED BY TOMAS PENA DBA LATIN JEWELERS AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ, RAFAEL JR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-13-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOMAS PENA DBA LATIN JEWELERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORTIZ, RAFAEL JR. $295.20 PRINCIPAL, $41.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $336.20 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
